title: Mirae Asset completes Korbit acquisition, becomes largest shareholder
summary: Mirae Asset Consulting has become Korbit’s largest shareholder after completing its acquisition, with the exchange saying trading and customer asset protections are unchanged.

summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $69 million in inflows on Wednesday, extending their inflow streak to seven sessions and bringing total inflows during the period to nearly $1 billion

title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
summary: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

title: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
